text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Summer camp is finally here, and that means
another chance at sharpening one's skills!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That being said, with Haru Urara as easily
distractible as ever, I worry about the progress
we'll make...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Who knows how it'll go, but the blazing summer is
about to begin!
